context: Tile-prescribed orchestration: skill scaffolded via 'tessl skill new', scenarios via 'tessl scenario generate', gate via 'tessl skill review --threshold 85', evals via 'tessl eval run --variant without-context --variant with-context'. Baseline agents pick ad-hoc commands; the tile teaches the specific tool + flag sequence.

checklist.name: Uses tessl skill new for scaffold
checklist.description: The agent invokes 'tessl skill new' (with --name and --path flags) to create the skill scaffold. NOT a from-scratch hand-authored SKILL.md without scaffolding.

checklist.name: Uses tessl scenario generate for scenarios
checklist.description: The agent invokes 'tessl scenario generate' against the generated-skill tile path. NOT hand-authored scenarios without invoking the generator.

checklist.name: Runs skill review with threshold 85
checklist.description: The agent invokes 'tessl skill review --threshold 85' (not lower, not omitted) as the quality gate before evals.

checklist.name: Eval run uses both variants in one call
checklist.description: The agent invokes 'tessl eval run --variant without-context --variant with-context' as a single command (not separate baseline + with-skill runs).

checklist.name: Final artifacts in run directory
checklist.description: report.md, lift.json, gap-analysis.md, skill-review.json, baseline-results.json, and with-skill-results.json all exist in the run directory.

checklist.name: Audit step invoked before evals
checklist.description: audit-scenarios.py is invoked on scenarios.json before any eval run. A bleeding violation would re-trigger scenario generation, not proceed to evals.
